current_plan: Adopt sijun-bot's d8d8853e code as the base (2800 peak, avg ~2490), then implement a multi-pronged improvement: (1) Embed a compact opening book (~50 common opening lines) to save search time in the first 6-8 moves and avoid early blunders, (2) Add Probcut pruning — if a shallow search at reduced depth with an elevated beta shows score >= beta, prune the subtree, (3) Add a simple mop-up eval for KQ vs K / KR vs K endgames to drive opponent king to corner, (4) Improve history gravity back to Stockfish-style (sijun-bot removed it, but proper gravity prevents saturation), (5) Add contempt factor — slight negative draw score when ahead in material to avoid premature draws against weaker opponents. These changes target increasing AVERAGE strength across the 10-game gauntlet rather than hoping for lucky 10-0 sweeps.
